allow: Bash(python -c "from game_manager import RoomManager, Player; rm = RoomManager\(\); room = rm.create_room\(\); p1 = Player\('1','A'\); p2 = Player\('2','B'\); p3 = Player\('3','C'\); p4 = Player\('4','D'\); print\(room.add_player\(p1\)\); print\(room.add_player\(p2\)\); print\(room.add_player\(p3\)\); print\(room.add_player\(p4\)\); print\('Mode:', room.mode\); print\('Hands dealt:', len\(room.hands\)\); s = room.get_state_for_player\('1'\); print\('Player 1 hand:', s['hand']\); print\('Bid options count:', len\(s['bid_options']\) if s['bid_options'] else 0\)")
